deterministic.description: Fixture predicate requiring source-backed process selection before draft guidance.

deontic.description: Fixture predicate reminding agents that official actions remain blocked.

temporal.description: Fixture predicate requiring stale evidence review before release.

reversible.description: Fixture gate allowing metadata-only draft planning.

refused.description: Fixture gate refusing consequential official actions.

exact_confirmation.description: Fixture gate requiring exact user confirmation before attended checkpoints.

agent_facing_explanations.template: Fixture explanation for an inactive candidate that remains pending manual review.

reviewer_rows.release_blocker_note: Fixture release blocker requiring manual review before any release decision.
reviewer_rows.rollback_note: Fixture rollback note discarding inactive candidate metadata only.
